qa_pairs.question: How do you install the Arrow R bindings?
qa_pairs.answer: After setting up the required modules and environment variables, you can install the Arrow R bindings by executing the command `R -e 'install.packages("arrow", repos="https://cloud.r-project.org/")'`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to load and use the Arrow R library after it has been installed?
qa_pairs.answer: To load and use the Arrow R library after installation, first load the necessary modules with `module load StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 arrow/8 r/4.1`. Then, load the library within R by running `R -e "library(arrow)"`.
